comment: Excellent challenges! The web exploitation category was particularly well-crafted.
Great event overall. Would love harder binary challenges next time.
Best CTF I've attended at UTM. The hints system was very helpful for beginners.
Amazing hackathon. Learnt more in 48 hours than an entire semester.
Great mentors throughout the night. The winning solution was genuinely impressive.
Best badminton event UTM has hosted. Excellent organisation.
Citrawarna never disappoints. The Sabahan traditional dance segment was breathtaking.
The fundraising talk alone was worth the trip. Very practical, no fluff.
Really well-structured for beginners. Got my first bronze medal on Kaggle!
Beautiful event. The community spirit was incredible. Will join every year.
Kembara Jiwa made me tear up twice. The cast is incredibly talented.
My CV went from zero to hero in one day. Got three interview calls the week after.
The route through the forest was beautiful. Hope they add a 10K next year.
